metadata.name: Write Social Media Posts for a Week

description: A social media manager needs to write and schedule a week's worth of posts for a client's Instagram account.

nodes.task_description: Review the content calendar for the week's themes.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent identifies the topics for each day.

nodes.task_description: Write engaging captions for five posts, including relevant hashtags and user tags.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent produces five on-brand and engaging pieces of copy.

nodes.task_description: Schedule each post for its designated day and time in the social media scheduling tool.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent successfully schedules all content for the week.
